# extract-glossary

> Use when you need onboarding or reusable knowledge docs from one or more repositories, and must extract domain terms, repository maps, architecture notes, or small Mermaid diagrams grounded in code and documentation.

## Install

### APM (recommended)

```bash
apm install HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/extract-glossary
```

Or declare it in `apm.yml` for a reproducible setup:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/extract-glossary
```

then run `apm install`.

### Any agentskills.io-compatible agent

This is an [Agent Skills](https://agentskills.io) skill — a portable
`SKILL.md` folder that works with Claude Code, Codex, opencode, Gemini CLI,
Cursor, and other [compatible agents](https://agentskills.io/clients).

With the [`skills`](https://github.com/vercel-labs/skills) CLI (installs into
every detected agent's skills directory):

```bash
npx skills add HukuKaich0u/agent-kit --skill extract-glossary
```

Or copy the folder in directly:

```bash
npx degit HukuKaich0u/agent-kit/skills/meta/extract-glossary ~/.claude/skills/extract-glossary
```

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
<!-- apm:readme:end -->

# extract-glossary

Repository や organization から、オンボーディングや AI 再利用向けの用語集・構成メモ・小さな Mermaid 図を作る skill です。

Claude / Codex の両方で使う前提で整えています。詳細は [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) を参照してください。
